alt: Crisp close-up of an archerfish's large binocular eyes and pointed upward-angled mouth
caption: Their large, forward-positioned binocular eyes possess incredible visual adaptations that perfectly calculate and correct for light refraction across the air-water interface.
acquisitionNotes: Spectacular close-up of binocular eye morphology and pointed shooting mouth structure. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/f/fe/Toxotes_jaculatrix_%28banded_archerfish%29_3_%2815099317284%29.jpg
